THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUXTON, JANICE TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, JAMES PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING BY HER COMPLAINT IN THIS ACTION FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT AND COMMONLY KNOWN AS 1221 FOLSOM ST., SAN FRANCISCO. DEFENDANT JAMES CALLAHAN IS DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION WITH SUCH COSTS AS MAY SUBSEQUENTLY BE AWARDED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, JAMES RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF BUXTON, JANICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1221 FOLSOM STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIF $31,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $6,363.62 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $37,363.62, DEFENDANT JAMES CALLAHAN IS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT AND COMMONLY KNOWN AS 1221 FOLSOM STREET, SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF JANICE BUXTON SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM HER COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT JAMES CALLAHAN IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER ATTORNEY FEES TOGETHER WITH OTHER COURT COSTS PURSUANT TO THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS, ALL PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY, MICHAEL C. HALL. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
